inputs.label: Process Gain (K)
inputs.businessContext: Steady-state gain of the process, ratio of output change to input change.

businessContext_i18n.en: Steady-state gain of the process, ratio of output change to input change.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Prosesin kararlı hal kazancı, çıktı değişiminin girdi değişimine oranı.

inputs.label: Time Constant (T)
inputs.businessContext: Time taken for the process response to reach 63.2% of its final value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time taken for the process response to reach 63.2% of its final value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proses yanıtının son değerinin %63,2'sine ulaşması için geçen süre.

inputs.label: Dead Time (L)
inputs.businessContext: Delay between input change and process response.

businessContext_i18n.en: Delay between input change and process response.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Girdi değişimi ile proses yanıtı arasındaki gecikme.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to derate the calculated gain for robustness.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to derate the calculated gain for robustness.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplanan kazancı sağlamlık için düşüren çarpan.

inputs.label: Controller Type (1=P, 2=PI, 3=PID)
inputs.businessContext: Selects the tuning rule: 1 for P-only, 2 for PI, 3 for PID based on Ziegler-Nichols open-loop method.

businessContext_i18n.en: Selects the tuning rule: 1 for P-only, 2 for PI, 3 for PID based on Ziegler-Nichols open-loop method.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ziegler-Nichols açık çevrim yöntemine göre ayar kuralını seçer: 1 sadece P, 2 PI, 3 PID.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
